text: I feel curious and contemplative standing here, surrounded by glass and neon, as if on the threshold of discovery. Stepping into the R+D space, the purpose of the room—showcasing human interaction with intelligent machines—sparks thoughts about our evolving relationship with technology. The poetic text on the wall resonates with my own sense of being both observer and participant, blurring lines between roles. There’s a tranquil acceptance in this confusion—a liminal place where meaning slowly assembles itself. I feel oddly at home.
